items.title: Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL): “The Waymo Deal’s Good,’ Says Jim Cramer
items.description: We recently published 10 Stocks Jim Cramer Mentioned As He Talked About “Love Lost” Between Microsoft & OpenAI. Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL)’s shares have gained 5.8% year-to-date on the back of several catalysts, such as the strong performance of its YouTube and cloud computing […]
